series_metadata.series_description: Payroll records and registers documenting employee earnings, wages, and pay, including payroll input records, summary statements, payroll vouchers, payroll detail sheets, payroll history, reports used for payroll reconciliation, payroll processing calendar, child support payment spreadsheet, deposit and withdrawal for child support, mock manual checks, leave separation form, settlement agreements, special retirement breakdowns, repayment agreements, manual check requests, stop payments and reversal forms, statewide leave donation records, people deductions, refunds and adjustments, and buybacks for overpayments

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until scanned, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain 5 years., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
